title: Time Series Forecast Function Updating Process
description: A flowchart illustrating how a forecast function is updated when new data becomes available, using a generic time series model as an example.
relationships: Initial Forecast Function generates a forecast for period t+1
New Observation is compared to the forecast, creating a Forecast Error
Model Parameters are updated based on the Forecast Error and a smoothing constant
Updated Forecast Function is created for the next period (t+2)
